name: Funding Ratio
description: Funding Ratio = Available Assets / Pension Capital (BVV2 Art. 44). Below 100% the fund is underfunded and must take measures.
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='4' y='4' width='16' height='16' rx='2'/><path d='M8 12h8'/></svg>
